regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-07-02 (Wednesday). S&P 500 closed July 1 at 7,483 (-0.2% on the day); up 9.6% H1 2026, Nasdaq +12.8%, Russell 2000 +22% best H1 since 1991. July 2 markets opened lower as investors digested jobs data and awaited Fed Chair Warsh. June ADP private payrolls 98K (below 115K consensus); official June NFP released 8:30 AM ET today — consensus 115K jobs, 4.3% unemployment. 10Y Treasury yield 4.47% (slightly eased from 4.50%). DXY ~101.2 (still elevated; strong USD headwind for risk assets). EURUSD 1.16. Fed (Warsh) held rates at 3.5-3.75% on June 17; 9 of 18 FOMC members project a rate hike before year-end; PCE revised up to 3.6% — hawkish posture. Crypto recovering sharply: BTC $61,039 (+3.81%), ETH $1,642 (+4.09%), SOL $79.53 (+5.59%), total mcap $2.19T (+3.33% 24h). BTC dominance 55.84%. Fear and Greed 19 (Extreme Fear) — contrarian bullish signal persisting 3+ weeks. BTC ETF outflows continue (IBIT -$212M, FBTC -$10M). Citi cut 12-month BTC target to $82K. META surged +8.81% to $612.91 on July 1 (watchlist). Crypto sleeve at 19.27% of NAV — within 20% neutral cap, no room to add. Cash at 13.72% of NAV. REGIME UNCHANGED — S&P in uptrend but Fed hawkish, DXY elevated, BTC ETF outflows, Extreme Fear: not enough evidence for risk-on. No trades: all theses intact above invalidation levels; jobs report uncertainty warrants patience; no new position clears the bar today.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $745.00 (above $741.75 avgCost; +0.44%, ~13.26% NAV). S&P 500 up 9.6% H1 2026; broad index resilient with improving breadth. Hold as diversified US equity anchor; key macro catalyst is July NFP + Fed July 29 FOMC.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed multi-hike path forcing a technical downtrend in the broad index.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $197.58 (below $208.44 avgCost; -5.20%, ~13.96% NAV). Down -1.25% on July 1 amid early tech rotation but AI capex cycle and data-center demand intact. Secular thesis unbroken; monitor AI demand commentary at upcoming earnings.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below 150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $384.28 (below $391.98 avgCost; -1.96%, ~14.86% NAV). Recovering from June lows. Azure + Copilot growth intact; approaching 15% position cap so no further adds without NAV growth. HOLD.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $361.21 (below $366.53 avgCost; -1.45%, ~14.41% NAV). Strong recovery from $337 lows in June — nearly back to avg cost. Search monopoly thesis intact; AI integration ongoing. HOLD.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals causing revenue decline; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $426.54 (above $408.52 avgCost; +4.41%, ~6.36% NAV). Healthcare defensives providing portfolio ballast during rate-uncertainty period. Small position serves as natural risk hedge. HOLD.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $370.60 (below $386.54 avgCost; -4.12%, ~4.16% NAV). DXY elevated at 101.2 is a headwind; Fed hawkish posture also weighs on gold. Small position limits NAV drag while providing asymmetric upside in risk-off scenario or USD reversal. HOLD.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with strong USD reversal sustained; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $61,039 (below $64,629 avgCost; -5.56%, ~13.91% NAV). +3.81% recovery today after worst June in 2026. F&G 19 (Extreme Fear) historically contrarian bullish. BTC dominance 55.84% stable. Crypto sleeve at 19.27% — at 20% neutral cap, cannot add. Hold; await regime improvement or sleeve room.

ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $79.53 (above $67.81 avgCost; +17.28%, ~1.36% NAV). Up +5.59% today, outperforming peers. Small position capturing upside in crypto recovery. Crypto sleeve at 19.27% — no room to add. Hold small position for upside when regime flips to risk-on.
